title: Chytraculia eugenioides
taxonomy: Chytraculia eugenioides is a species within the family Anacampserotaceae and the order Caryophyllales. It is a succulent plant native to southern Africa. Chytraculia eugenioides is further classified as a member of the genus Chytraculia, which is part of the family Anacampserotaceae. The classification of this plant is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. As a result, Chytraculia eugenioides is placed within the broader taxonomic groups of flowering plants and angiosperms.
